description: A physical geography professor needs a visual and quantitative demonstration of the Andean Rain Shadow effect for an upcoming lecture. Refer to ~/Desktop/rain_shadow_request.txt for details. Using NASA Panoply and the NCEP precipitation climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/, create a 1D spatial cross-section (line plot) of precipitation across South America at 15°S for January, showing precipitation versus longitude. Export the plot and a structured report identifying the longitudes of the windward precipitation peak and the leeward desert minimum to ~/Documents/OrographicStudy/.
